findings: Metaswarm flags (--metaswarm, --count, --model, --models) properly gate commander mode
--metaswarm switches from stampede-agent to stampede-commander with full env vars
Task claiming is delegated to agent behavior (instructed atomic mv), not enforced in launcher code
Branch naming not enforced or created in stampede.sh - delegated to agents
No silent count downgrade: metaswarm over 5 hard-fails; but failed pane starts only print counts without marking partial
Autonomous execution uses --autopilot with -p and --no-ask-user correctly; no -i usage
